case_title: MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. VS DRAKE BEAM MARIN, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $637.64 FILED BY MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DRAKE BEAM MARIN, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
CERTIFIED MAIL TO ALEXA ALVAREZ REPRESENTATIVE RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DRAKE BEAM MARIN, INC. $637.64 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $673.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DRAKE BEAM MARIN, INC.
